ifFalseActivities.name: Fail if column count does not match

transformations.name: selectRequiredColumns
transformations.description: Renaming filterEuropeOnly to selectRequiredColumns with columns 'country, country_code, population, indicator, daily_count, date, source'

scriptLines: SelectRequiredAfterLookup split(indicator == 'Weekly new hospital admissions per 100k' || indicator == 'Weekly new ICU admissions per 100k',
pivotBy(indicator, ['Weekly new ICU admissions per 100k', 'Weekly new hospital admissions per 100k']),
